name: t90menuscales
purpose: Current fast/playable t90viewge plus only GE-style menu float/scale words.

name: t90menuplace
purpose: Current fast/playable t90viewge plus menu05_09 placement/integer words, excluding scale words, pointer words, and helper blob.

name: t90menusafe
purpose: Current fast/playable t90viewge plus menu05_09 safe shell minus the known-suspect pointer words and helper blob.
